metadata.description: Official JeriCommerce plugins for Claude Code. Loyalty programs, ecommerce analytics, and more.

plugins.name: loyalty-specialist
plugins.description: Jeri - Generate professional PDF loyalty program performance reports for JeriCommerce clients by querying Metabase and analyzing program data

plugins.name: bug-reporter
plugins.description: Jeri - Report bugs and customer issues to Linear through guided conversational flow with screenshots and video support

plugins.name: qa-specialist
plugins.description: Jeri - QA testing assistant that helps verify features and bugs using the JeriCommerce API, Metabase data, and BetterStack logs, documenting findings in Linear tickets

plugins.name: feature-request
plugins.description: Jeri - Capture customer feature requests as user stories in Linear with customer association and detailed requirement gathering

plugins.name: loyalty-template-creator
plugins.description: Jeri - Create CDN loyalty page templates for Shopify theme extensions by replicating the visual style of a reference website

plugins.name: niche-research
plugins.description: Jeri - Generate pSEO niche research reports from Ahrefs data, ready to copy into the JeriCommerce blog repo

plugins.name: optimize-skills
plugins.description: Audit and restructure Claude Code skills into modular folder structures for better consistency and maintainability
